summary: This record previously documented the full seven-value AppCompat policy bundle written by the app. It was split on 2026-03-13 into three focused child records and now exists only as an audit trail: privacy.disable-appcompat-engine.policy, privacy.disable-appdeviceinventory.policy, and privacy.disable-program-compatibility-assistant.

setting.name: Application Compatibility Policy Bundle (Deprecated Split Reference)
setting.casual_explanation: This parent record is deprecated. Use the child records for current research.
setting.why_people_change_it: This record is no longer used for research decisions because the original mixed bundle has been split by policy family.
setting.tradeoffs_overview: Keeping a deprecated parent preserves the audit trail and old record identity without forcing future research to reason about a mixed-policy bundle.
setting.professional_notes: The original split happened before the provider fix. Today the app still writes the seven-value bundle in one code path, but the PCA value has been corrected from DisablePcaUI to DisablePCA. Child records: privacy.disable-appcompat-engine.policy (DisableEngine + SbEnable), privacy.disable-appdeviceinventory.policy (DisableAPISamping + DisableApplicationFootprint + DisableInstallTracing + DisableWin32AppBackup), privacy.disable-program-compatibility-assistant (DisablePCA).

targets.path: Application compatibility research split audit trail

allowed_values.label: Deprecated split record
allowed_values.meaning: This record exists only as an audit trail. Use the three child records for current research and publication decisions.

targets.notes: Synthetic audit-only target added to satisfy schema requirements while preserving this record ID as a deprecated reference.

app_current_implementation.notes: App implementation unchanged. See child records for current implementation details and evidence mapping.

windows_defaults.label: Deprecated audit trail

states.rationale: This record remains only to preserve the split history and the original record identity.

windows_defaults.notes: No OS behavior is modeled here anymore; this baseline exists only to keep the deprecated parent schema-valid.

recommended_profiles.label: Use child records
intended_for: Researchers reviewing the former mixed bundle
avoid_for: Anyone looking for a current publishable policy record

states.rationale: This profile points reviewers to the child records instead of the retired mixed bundle.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You need an audit trail from the old record ID to the new focused records.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You are trying to make apply or publication decisions from this deprecated parent record.
tradeoffs: Preserves history and linkage for the old record ID.
Prevents future research from treating the mixed bundle as a current source of truth.

evidence.title: Split audit trail
evidence.summary: The original mixed application-compatibility policy record was retired on 2026-03-13 and replaced with three focused child records: privacy.disable-appcompat-engine.policy, privacy.disable-appdeviceinventory.policy, and privacy.disable-program-compatibility-assistant.

decision.why: Deprecated after the mixed bundle was split into focused child records. This parent record remains only as an audit trail and should not drive research, validation, or publication decisions.
